content:
Excellent work on Task 17! 🎉

Your test coverage is outstanding:
- 90% instruction coverage (exceeds the 80% requirement)
- 100% branch coverage on the security-critical safePath() method
- 29 comprehensive test cases covering valid paths, security attacks, edge cases

The test categories you've organized are exactly what we need for a security-sensitive utility. Adding jacoco for ongoing coverage tracking is a great touch.

Task 17 is complete. Great job!
